Translation.Value: Invalid parameter, specify a kit with /kit <name>
You don't have permissions to use this kit
You have to wait {0} seconds to use this command again
You have to wait {0} seconds to get this kit again
You have access to the following kits: {0}
You can't afford the kit {2}. You need atleast {0} {1}.
You have received {0} {1} from the kit {2}.
You have received {0} xp from the kit {1}.
